zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard VII Tempest於1356年出生在英國越可爾布拉可維爾時，他的父親Sir Richard VI Tempest23歲，母親Mary Talbot21歲。他於1377年與Margaret Staynforth結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1428年9月30日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard VII Tempest于1356年出生在英国越可爾布拉可維爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard VI Tempest23岁，母亲Mary Talbot21岁。他于1377年与Margaret Staynforth结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1428年9月30日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Tempest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): nickname for someone with a blustery temperament, from Middle English, Old French tempest(e) ‘storm’ (from Latin tempestas ‘weather, season’, a derivative of tempus ‘time’).

variants.name: Tempesta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Carlo, Raffaele, Agostino, Angelo, Carmelo, Cesare, Cesidio, Dante, Elio, Ezio, Gino.
Italian: nickname for someone with a stormy temperament, from tempesta ‘storm, tempest’ (see Tempest ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard VII Tempest was born in 1356, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard VI Tempest, was 23 and his mother, Mary Talbot, was 21. He married Margaret Staynforth in 1377. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 30 September 1428, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard VII Tempest est né en 1356, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard VI Tempest, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary Talbot, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Staynforth en 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 30 septembre 1428, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard VII Tempest 1356 in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard VI Tempest 23 und seine Mutter Mary Talbot 21. Er hat 1377 Margaret Staynforth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 30. September 1428 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard VII Tempest è nato il nel 1356 nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard VI Tempest, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mary Talbot, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Staynforth nel 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 30 settembre 1428, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard VII Tempestが1356年にイギリスヨークシュアイアブレイセウエルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard VI Tempestは23歳，母Mary Talbotは21歳であった。1377年にMargaret Staynforthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1428年9月30日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard VII Tempest(이)가 1356년 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard VI Tempest(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Talbot(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1377년 Margaret Staynforth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1428년 9월 30일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard VII Tempest nasceu em 1356, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard VI Tempest, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary Talbot, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Staynforth em 1377. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 30 de setembro de 1428, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard VII Tempest родился в 1356 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard VI Tempest было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Talbot, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Staynforth в 1377 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 30 сентябрь 1428 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard VII Tempest nació en 1356, en Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard VI Tempest, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mary Talbot, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Staynforth en 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 30 de septiembre de 1428, en su pueblo.
